patterns.message: Warning: Freezing level rising (1924 → 1986 → 2110m). Rain risk at freeride elevations.
Upslope event Day 5: S/SE wind at 124°, humidity 76%, temp -3°C. Enhanced orographic snowfall likely.
Close to warming concern: Freezing level rising to 1595m (threshold 2000m).
